item.title: Audit trail (tool + egress + secrets)
item.intent: Log every tool execution, secret access, and egress event to tamper-evident JSONL. The user must be able to answer 'what did my agent do?' at any time.
item.description: TRANSPARENCY PROMISE: 'You know what your agent did, what data it touched, and what left your machine' — this is a design principle. Without audit trail, it's just a claim. The user should be able to ask 'what did my agent do today?' and get an answer. HMAC-chaining on secret lifecycle means the audit is tamper-evident, not just logged. OWASP compliance export matters for the Tinkerer persona running in an org context. Acceptance: every tool execution logged to JSONL; secret lifecycle events HMAC-chained; 'clawhq audit' shows recent activity; export produces OWASP-compatible format.
steps: Implement tool execution audit logging to append-only JSONL
Add 'clawhq audit' command for recent activity view
acceptanceCriteria: Every tool execution logged to append-only JSONL
